task: Phase 1 residual — pipelineCore / asset-engine tsc errors
blocker_reason: pipelineCore.ts is LIVE publish authority (PUBLISH_COMPILE_AUTHORITY = pipelineCore+normalize). asset-engine imports it via runSvgCompileStages / compileSvgForPublish. Residual TS2322/TS2352 prevented clean site tsc and reflected incorrect polygon-clipping nesting types on the publish path.

evidence_before.command: cd site; npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "asset-engine|pipelineCore|error TS" | Select-Object -First 40
errors: scripts/generate-svg/pipelineCore.ts(150,59): TS2322 Polygon not assignable to Ring | Pair
scripts/generate-svg/pipelineCore.ts(153,57): TS2322 Polygon not assignable to Ring
scripts/generate-svg/pipelineCore.ts(155,44): TS2322 Polygon not assignable to [number, number][]
scripts/generate-svg/pipelineCore.ts(176,22): TS2352 PolygonRing[] cast to [number, number][] may be mistake
scripts/generate-svg/pipelineCore.ts(252-255): TS2322 number not assignable to [number, number] (×8) from blockToPolygon
evidence_before.asset_engine_import_errors: none standalone — errors only in pipelineCore.ts which asset-engine imports

root_cause.summary: Local geometry types mismatched polygon-clipping hierarchy; blockToPolygon returned a Ring typed as Polygon, and applyBooleanOp double-wrapped ([[poly]]) to compensate at runtime.

defects.bug: Returned Ring ([[x,y],...]) with return type Polygon (Ring[]). TS saw each [number,number] element as needing to be a Ring.
defects.runtime: Produced one nesting level short of Polygon

defects.bug: Passed [[polygons[i]]] (MultiPolygon[]) into union instead of [polygons[i]] (MultiPolygon). Types failed; runtime only worked because blockToPolygon was also one level short — double-wrap compensated.
defects.runtime: Compensating double-wrap made MultiPolygon shape accidentally correct

defects.bug: Signature PolygonRing[][] but body treated each element as Pair[] (a single ring). Caller used `as unknown as PolygonRing[][]` to silence mismatch with applyBooleanOp's PolygonRing[] return.

fix.scope: type + nesting alignment only; no asset-engine API change
changes: blockToPolygon: wrap rect points as one outer ring → return [ring] (true Polygon)
applyBooleanOp: pass MultiPolygon as [polygon] not [[polygon]]; type acc/next as MultiPolygon; drop unsafe casts
polygonsToPath: accept PolygonRing[] (rings of one polygon); iterate Pair points without .flat() cast

tsc.command: cd site; npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "asset-engine|pipelineCore|error TS" | Select-Object -First 40

vitest.notes: Golden round-trips (chaise/side-table/sectional) still byte-match pinned goldens — nesting fix preserved runtime MultiPolygon shape

next_step: None for this residual; pipelineCore type residual closed. Remaining Phase 1 work is outside this root cause.
